textByHashes.9a245d16e7bae18f3044bcb6a8590d1ad72fe8e2: Ahh, a kind stranger. Get this old man a drink so that he may wet his throat and tell you of the strange happenings in this town.
textByHashes.23305f5a58fe1e2e1b0aaf42ea27561e61545f4f: Now where were we? Ah yes, Ali Morrisane's wayward nephew.
textByHashes.629d9971cfc0a3bd69eb754e54b7ce23e1c763ed: Er... well, he's a real scamp, that lad! I can't imagine a stranger would be asking after anyone else.
textByHashes.02ea704039f929c7ea938d784776b4ad874a4852: I'd tell you more, but my throat is drying up. This desert climate is an inhospitable one. Get me another beer so that I can continue my tale.
textByHashes.9e94da1d76108770ef84a1c963232daa03bb8b56: Get this poor, thirsty old man another drink so that he may wet his lips and continue.
textByHashes.9198be1395409cea0eb6dba0f6b0672c81972dca: You are too kind, now what were we talking about?
textByHashes.8bddf2bf3bb87e7340159ac1e256b2bb16b523a5: Of course! I've known him since he was a wee lad. A right little mischievous beggar...
textByHashes.738c1e56657e574369b882519379874d29da59b6: Well now, if you had just asked me that in the first place I would have told you directly!
textByHashes.d6d63d56468f23cf6fa9e55ca3e4d638387b542d: Alas, my throat has dried up, and I cannot speak... perhaps another drink would help?
textByHashes.53aa8e7f9a6fc6cc04e3e4a78bac5e68a59919fd: Now which of you two adventurers wanted to know where Ali's nephew is?
textByHashes.ce4f3c3d36be4fe238764df69a7bcc23511eec92: Is this a double? No wonder I feel sick...
textByHashes.d288070e6eddfca5c7730d54f4c99ffce8da640e: Now is that his nephew from his side or his wife's? They have a huge family you see. I remember...
textByHashes.2f1e579e7be8816180cbe366d07b5f9b97d7ac6a: But my lips are so dry, how can I possibly continue?
textByHashes.08ab5fe91c2535357832573a954c7fbcf45e37dd: I see. Don't worry about me, I'll just have to soldier on. Now what do you want to know?
textByHashes.b63bc9f4b416f4830854c703815ec078675e5e26: Wait, wait! The last I heard he was in trouble with those gangs hanging around town. You won't get any answers out of them, though, not while they're feuding. Maybe if you were to solve that little problem...
textByHashes.daca2a64bfb6dc5ae2efa65610dde483c79e0258: Anyway, is there any chance of another beer?
textByHashes.14e212dbeb8554b6cf33f33dc35744ad787e536b: What were we talking about again? Yes yes, when I was a boy... no, that's not it.
textByHashes.a282e9d8ce56e39e3eb24fb469cba61766e8ce79: Eh? What's this? I don't want that, get me a beer.
textByHashes.d20d02bc0452ecb5694ce43970d3200a86411377: Ahh, a kind stranger. Get this old man another drink so that he may wet his throat and talk to you.
textByHashes.8125a1c7d88fd6d4b6fa5d9c212c7cb3a1e09ceb: Wha'? Are you lookin' at me? Are you lookin' at me? You know something? You're drunk, you are.
textByHashes.6e4d54eec6abc19a5daffe742da9b86900ecc5c8: Did you hear the one where the camel walks into the bar and orders a pint? The barman asks 'Why the long face!'.
textByHashes.43199fe3756d92ca94b3e3b797d82d6eecfba28f: Did you hear the one about the man who walked into a bar? He hurt his foot! Hah!
textByHashes.fbf53324b53ebdf3d7ad9c917cbe50a66311d9fb: I've got a lovely bunch of coconuts! Hehehe...
textByHashes.4fd3aeb53a200d91245c3cdfb17e537b41aa8c98: You know, I have this friend, and she... I can't remember. What was I saying?
textByHashes.4943e6bf421c9c1dcb13975df95f6942f481ec31: Thank you my friend - now if you don't mind I'm having a conversation with my imaginary friend Ali here.
textByHashes.763a6834d37f53cdc61c8db0ee0becda1a67ee03: I was a sailor once, you know...
